info.title: Nexora CRM API - Complete Reference
info.description:
Complete API reference for Nexora CRM with 400+ endpoints organized by module

Base URL: https://api.nexoraos.pro/api/v1
Authentication: Bearer Token (JWT)

Generated: 2026-02-05
Total Modules: 15
Total Endpoints: 400+

## Quick Start
1. Run Login request first (saves token automatically)
2. Use the token for all other requests
3. Replace {{variables}} with actual IDs

## Test Credentials
- Email: admin@helixcode.in
- Password: Demo123456

get.description:
## List Companies

### Query Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| page | number | No | Page number |
| limit | number | No | Items per page |
| search | string | No | Search by name |

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "company_id",
      "name": "Acme Corp",
      "domain": "acme.com",
      "industry": "Technology",
      "size": "50-200",
      "contactsCount": 15
    }
  ]
}
```

post.description:
## Create Company

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | Company name |
| domain | string | No | Website domain |
| industry | string | No | Industry sector |
| size | string | No | Company size |
| address | string | No | Business address |
| phone | string | No | Phone number |
| email | string | No | Contact email |
| customFields | object | No | Custom field values |

get.description:
## Get Company by ID

### Path Parameters
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| id | string | Yes | Company ID |

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": "company_id",
    "name": "Acme Corp",
    "domain": "acme.com",
    "industry": "Technology",
    "size": "50-200",
    "address": "123 Main St",
    "phone": "+1234567890",
    "email": "info@acme.com",
    "customFields": {}
  }
}
```

patch.description:
## Update Company

### Request Body (all optional)
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| name | string | Company name |
| domain | string | Website domain |
| industry | string | Industry sector |
| address | string | Business address |
| customFields | object | Custom field values |

delete.description:
## Delete Company

Permanently delete a company. This will NOT delete associated contacts.

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Company deleted successfully"
}
```

get.description:
## Get Company Contacts

Retrieve all contacts associated with a company.

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "contact_id",
      "firstName": "John",
      "lastName": "Doe",
      "email": "john@acme.com",
      "jobTitle": "CEO"
    }
  ]
}
```

## List Leads

### Query Parameters
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| page | number | Page number |
| limit | number | Items per page |
| search | string | Search by name/email |
| status | string | Filter by status (new, contacted, qualified, lost) |
| source | string | Filter by lead source |
| ownerId | string | Filter by owner |

post.description:
## Create Lead

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| firstName | string | Yes | First name |
| lastName | string | Yes | Last name |
| email | string | No | Email address |
| phone | string | No | Phone number |
| company | string | No | Company name |
| jobTitle | string | No | Job title |
| source | string | No | Lead source |
| status | string | No | Status (new, contacted, qualified, lost) |
| qualificationScore | number | No | Initial score (0-100) |
| ownerId | string | No | Assigned owner ID |
| customFields | object | No | Custom field values |

get.description:
## Get Lead Statistics

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "total": 150,
    "new": 45,
    "contacted": 35,
    "qualified": 50,
    "lost": 20,
    "conversionRate": 33.3
  }
}
```
## Get Lead by ID

post.description:
## Qualify Lead

Mark a lead as qualified or unqualified.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| qualified | boolean | Yes | Is lead qualified |
| score | number | No | Qualification score |
| notes | string | No | Qualification notes |

## Convert Lead to Contact

Convert a qualified lead into a contact and optionally create a deal.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| createContact | boolean | Yes | Create contact record |
| createDeal | boolean | No | Also create a deal |
| dealData | object | No | Deal details if creating |
## Reset Scoring Configuration to Defaults

## Recalculate All Lead Scores

Triggers recalculation of scores for all leads based on current config.

get.description: Get current user profile settings

## Get Organization Details

### Response
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "tenant_id",
    "name": "Helix Code",
    "slug": "helix-code",
    "logoUrl": "https://...",
    "address": "123 Business St",
    "phone": "+91 9876543210",
    "email": "admin@helixcode.in",
    "website": "https://helixcode.in",

    "currency": "INR",
    "locale": "en",
    "industry": "Technology",
    "size": "10-50"

```

patch.description:
## Update Organization

### Request Body (all optional)
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| name | string | Organization name |
| logoUrl | string | Logo URL (nullable) |
| address | string | Business address |
| phone | string | Phone number |
| email | string | Contact email (must be valid or empty) |
| website | string | Website URL (must be valid or empty) |
| timezone | string | Timezone (e.g., Asia/Kolkata) |
| currency | string | Currency code (e.g., INR, USD) |
| locale | string | Locale (e.g., en) |
| industry | string | Industry sector |
| size | string | Company size |
| settings | object | Additional settings |

example.name: Sales Manager
example.description: Can manage sales team and deals

post.description:
## Invite User

Send invitation email to new user.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| email | string | Yes | User's email |
| firstName | string | Yes | First name |
| lastName | string | Yes | Last name |
| roleId | string | Yes | Role to assign |

get.description:
## Get Audit Logs

### Query Parameters
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| limit | number | Max records (default: 50) |
| offset | number | Skip records |
| category | string | Filter by category |
| status | string | Filter by status |
| startDate | string | From date (ISO) |
| endDate | string | To date (ISO) |

## Get Connected Messaging Providers

Returns all configured messaging providers for the tenant.

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "integration_id",
      "name": "MSG91",
      "provider": "msg91",
      "status": "CONNECTED",
      "isValidated": true,
      "lastTestedAt": "2026-01-26T17:08:17.479Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

post.description:
## Save Messaging Provider

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| provider | enum | Yes | Provider type |
| name | string | No | Display name |
| credentials | object | Yes | Provider credentials |

get.description:
## Get Specific Messaging Provider

Provider options: msg91, twilio, gupshup, infobip, resend, fast2sms, telecmi

post.description:
## Test Provider Connection

Test credentials before saving.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| provider | enum | Yes | msg91, twilio, gupshup, infobip, resend, fast2sms, telecmi |
| credentials | object | Yes | Provider-specific credentials |

### Credentials by Provider
- **msg91**: `{ authKey: string }`
- **twilio**: `{ accountSid: string, authToken: string }`
- **infobip**: `{ apiKey: string, baseUrl: string }`
- **resend**: `{ apiKey: string }`

get.description:
## Get Combined Stats Across All Integrations

Channel types: sms, whatsapp, email, voice

post.description:
## Create Webhook

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | Webhook name |
| url | string | Yes | Callback URL |
| events | array | Yes | Events to subscribe |
| headers | object | No | Custom headers |
| retryPolicy.maxRetries | number | No | Max retries (0-10) |
| retryPolicy.retryDelay | number | No | Retry delay in seconds |

post.description:
## Create WhatsApp Template

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| templateName | string | Yes | Template name (lowercase, underscores) |
| category | string | Yes | UTILITY, MARKETING, AUTHENTICATION |
| language | string | Yes | Language code (en, hi, etc.) |
| components | array | Yes | Template components |

components.text: Thank you for shopping with us!

post.description:
## Send Template Message

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| recipient | string | Yes | Phone number with country code |
| templateName | string | Yes | Approved template name |
| languageCode | string | Yes | Template language code |
| components | array | No | Variable values |

## Send Text Message

Note: Text messages can only be sent within 24-hour window of user's last message.

example.text: Hello! This is a test message from Nexora CRM.

post.description:
## Send Media Message

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| recipient | string | Yes | Phone number |
| mediaType | string | Yes | image, video, audio, document |
| mediaUrl | string | Yes | Public URL of media |
| caption | string | No | Media caption |

## Send SMS

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| phone | string | Yes | Phone number with country code |
| message | string | Yes | SMS content |
| route | string | No | transactional, promotional |
| senderId | string | No | Sender ID |
| contactId | string | No | Link to CRM contact |

example.message: Your OTP is 123456. Valid for 5 minutes.

post.description:
## Send OTP

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| phone | string | Yes | Phone number |
| otp | string | Yes | OTP code |
| expiry | number | No | Expiry in seconds (default: 300) |

## Send DLT Template SMS (India)

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| phone | string | Yes | Phone number |
| templateId | string | Yes | DLT registered template ID |
| variables | array | No | Template variables |
| senderId | string | No | DLT registered sender ID |

## Send Bulk SMS

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| phones | array | Yes | Array of phone numbers |
| message | string | Yes | SMS content |
| route | string | No | transactional, promotional |
| senderId | string | No | Sender ID |

example.message: Special offer! Get 20% off on all products. Use code SAVE20.

get.description:
## List Templates

### Query Parameters
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| type | string | email, sms, whatsapp |
| category | string | marketing, transactional, notification |
| isActive | boolean | Filter by active status |
| search | string | Search by name |

example.name: appointment_reminder
example.content: Hi {{1}}, this is a reminder for your appointment on {{2}} at {{3}}. Reply YES to confirm or NO to cancel.

post.description:
## Duplicate Template

Create a copy of an existing template.

## Render Template Preview

Render template with sample variables to preview the output.

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| variables | object | Yes | Key-value pairs for variables |

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "rendered": "<html>...rendered content...</html>",
    "subject": "Welcome to Acme Corp, John!"
  }
}
```

## Create Pipeline Stage

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| name | string | Yes | Stage name |
| pipelineId | string | Yes | Pipeline ID |
| order | number | Yes | Display order |
| color | string | No | Stage color (hex) |
| description | string | No | Stage description |
| probability | number | No | Win probability (0-100) |
| isWon | boolean | No | Mark as won stage |
| isLost | boolean | No | Mark as lost stage |
| isClosed | boolean | No | Mark as closed stage |

## Create Deal

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| title | string | Yes | Deal title |
| pipelineId | string | Yes | Pipeline ID |
| stageId | string | Yes | Initial stage ID |
| contactId | string | No | Primary contact |
| companyId | string | No | Associated company |
| value | number | No | Deal value |
| currency | string | No | Currency code (default: USD) |
| probability | number | No | Win probability (0-100) |
| expectedCloseDate | string | No | Expected close date (ISO) |
| description | string | No | Deal description |
| products | array | No | Products/line items |

patch.description:
## Move Deal to Stage

Move deal to a different pipeline stage.

## Mark Deal as Won

Move deal to won state.

## Mark Deal as Lost

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| reason | string | No | Lost reason |

example.reason: Lost to competitor - price too high

post.description:
## Create Task

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| title | string | Yes | Task title |
| description | string | No | Task description |
| status | string | No | todo, in_progress, done |
| priority | string | No | low, medium, high, urgent |
| projectId | string | No | Parent project |
| milestoneId | string | No | Associated milestone |
| parentTaskId | string | No | Parent task (subtask) |
| assigneeId | string | No | Assigned user |
| dueDate | string | No | Due date (ISO) |
| startDate | string | No | Start date (ISO) |
| estimatedHours | number | No | Estimated hours |
| labels | array | No | Task labels |
| customFields | object | No | Custom field values |

example.title: Review Q1 sales report
example.description: Review and analyze the Q1 sales performance report

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look ahead

get.description:
## Get Task Statistics

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "total": 150,
    "completed": 80,
    "inProgress": 45,
    "todo": 25,
    "overdue": 5,
    "completionRate": 53.33
  }
}
```

example.content: This task needs to be prioritized. Client is waiting.

post.description:
## Add Task Dependency

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| dependsOnTaskId | string | Yes | Blocking task ID |
| type | string | No | finish_to_start, start_to_start, finish_to_finish |

## Create Calendar Event

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| title | string | Yes | Event title |
| description | string | No | Event description |
| type | string | No | meeting, call, task, reminder |
| startTime | string | Yes | Start time (ISO) |
| endTime | string | Yes | End time (ISO) |
| allDay | boolean | No | Is all-day event |
| timezone | string | No | Event timezone |
| location | string | No | Physical location |
| meetingUrl | string | No | Virtual meeting URL |
| isRecurring | boolean | No | Is recurring event |
| recurrence | object | No | Recurrence rules |
| status | string | No | scheduled, completed, cancelled |
| attendees | array | No | Event attendees |
| reminders | array | No | Reminder settings |
| color | string | No | Event color (hex) |
| metadata | object | No | Additional metadata |

get.description:
## Get Calendar Statistics

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "totalEvents": 50,
    "meetings": 30,
    "calls": 15,
    "tasks": 5,
    "completedRate": 80
  }
}
```

## Get Activity Feed

Returns recent activity across the organization.

## IP Lookup

Get geolocation and company info for an IP address.

post.description:
## Create Support Ticket

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| subject | string | Yes | Ticket subject |
| description | string | Yes | Detailed description |
| contactId | string | No | Contact who raised ticket |
| priority | string | No | low, medium, high, urgent |
| category | string | No | Ticket category |

example.subject: Unable to login to dashboard
example.description: Getting 'Invalid credentials' error even with correct password. Tried resetting password but still facing the issue.

get.description:
## Get Ticket Statistics

### Response
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "total": 250,
    "open": 45,
    "pending": 30,
    "resolved": 150,
    "closed": 25,
    "avgResolutionTime": "4.5 hours",
    "satisfactionScore": 4.2
  }
}
```

post.description:
## Add Comment to Ticket

### Request Body
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| content | string | Yes | Comment content |
| isInternal | boolean | No | Internal note (not visible to customer) |

example.content: We have identified the issue. It was related to session timeout. Please try clearing your browser cache and logging in again.

example.title: Enterprise Software License Quote
example.notes: This quote is valid for 30 days.

post.description:
## Create Invoice

### GST Invoice Fields (India)
| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| isGstInvoice | boolean | No | Is GST invoice |
| invoiceType | string | No | regular, export, sez |
| supplyType | string | No | B2B, B2C |
| buyerGstin | string | No | Buyer GSTIN |
| buyerLegalName | string | No | Legal name |
| buyerAddress | string | No | Address |
| buyerStateCode | string | No | State code |
| placeOfSupply | string | No | Place of supply |
